Glossary CSF Category A group of related cybersecurity outcomes that collectively comprise a CSF Function. CSF Community Profile A baseline of CSF outcomes that is created and published to address shared interests and goals among a number of organizations. A Community Profile is typically developed for a particular sector, subsector, technology, threat type, or other use case. An organization can use a Community Profile as the basis for its own Target Profile. CSF Core A taxonomy of high-level cybersecurity outcomes that can help any organization manage its cybersecurity risks.
